creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Olivier Certner from comment #4)

The quarterly branch is for users who would like to have a more stable software distribution with only quarterly feature updates.  Updates are only pushed to the quarterly branch to fix bugs, improve stability, fix security issues, or similar.  Feature updates should not be pushed to the quarterly branch, especially not those that may cause any sort of backwards incompatibility.

Unfortunately I do not know where this policy is documented.
